tracks.rawText: 0:23Studio Selectionv5CoverMid-tempo Latin pop ballad featuring a clean, rhythmic electric guitar intro with a subtle chorus effect, The arrangement is built around a steady 4/4 beat with a crisp snare and a warm bassline, The male vocals are melodic and emotive, characterized by a smooth tenor range and gentle vibrato, The chord progression follows a melancholic yet catchy minor-key sequence, Production is polished with a focus on vocal clarity, utilizing light reverb and delay to create a sense of space, The song structure begins with an instrumental hook before transitioning into a verse with a driving rhythmic pulse4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Studio Selection
